briefdescription.para: Encode a hostname as a DNS QNAME (label-length format).
Skip a QNAME in a DNS packet (handles compression pointers).

memberdef.argsstring: (const uint8_t *buf, size_t rx_len, SYN_SockAddr *addr_out, uint16_t expected_txid)
memberdef.name: parse_response

briefdescription.para: Parse a DNS response packet to extract the resolved IP.

detaileddescription.para: Checks transaction ID, question count, and pulls the first IPv4 A record.

parameterdescription.para: [out] Output structure for resolved IPv4 address.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_ERROR on format/parsing error.

briefdescription.para: Cooperative task for resolving a hostname via DNS.

detaileddescription.para: Register this as a SYN_TaskFunc with user_data pointing to a SYN_DnsResolver instance. The task runs non-blocking UDP queries, yielding via PT_YIELD until resolution completes or times out.

parameterdescription.para: Task structure whose user_data points to a SYN_DnsResolver.

simplesect.para: PT_WAITING while running, PT_EXITED when done, or PT_ENDED on early exit.

memberdef.argsstring: (const uint8_t *buf, size_t buf_len, size_t *pos, const char *hostname)
memberdef.name: match_qname_local

briefdescription.para: Cooperative task for responding to local mDNS queries.

parameterdescription.para: Task structure whose user_data points to a SYN_Mdns.

simplesect.para: PT_WAITING while running, PT_EXITED when done.

briefdescription.para: UDP DNS resolver and mDNS responder implementation.
